creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #6)

I always test if the port is buildable with poudriere before I push changes to the ports tree and I have never seen the "file not found" error.

Can you make it sure that the file in question (base/containers/flat_map.h) really exists in the working source after poudriere build error? The path should be ${WRKSRC}/base/containers/flat_map.h.
